title: Gene induction by natural toxins in Drosophila melanogaster
author: Robin, Charles
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The transcriptional response of third instar Drosophila larvae to food laced with caffeine, pyrethrum oil or neem oil was assessed using Agilent 4x44K printed microarrays.  Among the most notable responsive genes were those belonging to cytochrome P450 and Ecdysone-like kinase gene families.
steps_raw: The transcriptional response of third instar Drosophila larvae to food laced with caffeine, pyrethrum oil or neem oil was assessed using Agilent 4x44K printed microarrays.  Among the most notable responsive genes were those belonging to cytochrome P450 and Ecdysone-like kinase gene families.
